name: WpfHexEditorIDE
desc: WpfHexEditor Studio is a IDE built on WPF and .NET 8, designed for advanced binary analysis and reverse engineering—combining a powerful hex editor, deep inspe…
descFull: WpfHexEditor Studio is a IDE built on WPF and .NET 8, designed for advanced binary analysis and reverse engineering—combining a powerful hex editor, deep inspection tools, and native support for .NET projects and Visual Studio solutions in a single high-performance platform.
